{"id":"ci-g57","title":"Fracture plane analysis skill","description":"## What
Build the logic that reads strategy JTBDs, evals, and codebase to propose 2-3 genuinely different ways to slice a product into workstreams.

## Why
Moves FR-001a: Given strategy + evals, propose 2-3 fracture planes with trade-offs.
Without this, workstreams must be manually defined — defeating the Autonomy principle.

## Context
- Files: strategy.md, evals.json, product codebase
- APIs: none
- Prior tasks: none (first task)
- Shared resources: strategy.md (read-only)

## Done When
- [ ] Reads strategy.md and evals.json
- [ ] Proposes 2-3 fracture planes (e.g., by JTBD, by journey phase, by technical surface)
- [ ] Each option includes rationale and trade-offs
- [ ] Quality gate: typecheck && lint && test all pass

## Eval Spec
Given: A product with strategy.md containing 3+ JTBDs and evals.json
When: The onboarding skill runs
Then: 2-3 fracture plane options are presented with rationale

## Circuit Breakers
- 3 test failures on same error → STOP
- >5 files → STOP, task too broad","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"Michael Haase","owner":"haase210482@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-27T11:54:59Z","created_by":"Michael Haase","updated_at":"2026-03-27T12:41:14Z"}

- Prior tasks: Fracture plane analysis
- Shared resources: none

- [ ] Creates workstreams/[name]/ directory per workstream
- [ ] goal.md template: human prose, strategic direction
- [ ] ideas-backlog.md template: empty, structured hypothesis format documented
- [ ] .claude/CLAUDE.md template: wiring to goal.md, evals, backlog

Also enforces guard-001: evals referenced, never copied.

- Shared resources: evals.md (referenced, never copied)

- [ ] CLAUDE.md points to goal.md for direction
- [ ] CLAUDE.md references evals.md path (never copies content)

{"id":"ci-6mf","title":"Discord Channels setup","description":"## What
Configure Claude Code Channels to listen on workstream-specific Discord channels. Verify messages are received. Test on mobile.

## Why
Moves FR-002a: Message received via Channels within 60s.
This is the highest-risk task — if Channels doesn't support async listening, fall back to Chat SDK bot.

## Context
- Files: Claude Code Channels config, Discord server setup
- Prior tasks: CLAUDE.md wiring template (Epic 1 complete)
- Shared resources: Discord server (shared with all workstreams)

## Done When
- [ ] Discord server created with one channel per workstream
- [ ] Claude Code Channels configured to listen on each channel
- [ ] Test message sent from mobile → Claude Code receives it within 60s
- [ ] Quality gate: typecheck && lint && test all pass

## Eval Spec
Given: A Discord channel #improve-onboarding exists
When: User sends "I think the welcome screen is too long"
Then: Claude Code receives the message via Channels within 60 seconds

## Guardrails
- If Channels doesn't support persistent async listening: ESCALATE. Create fallback task for Chat SDK bot.

{"id":"ci-h94","title":"Sparring conversation flow","description":"## What
Build the enrichment logic: 2-3 clarifying questions, eval mapping, expected delta estimation. Reads goal.md for strategic context.

## Why
Moves FR-002b: Ask clarifying questions, map to evals, estimate delta.
This is the core of "Seamless Entry, Enriched Output" — the system asks good enough questions that the builder voluntarily keeps going.

## Context
- Files: sparring skill source, goal.md (read), evals.md (read by reference)
- Prior tasks: Idea capture skill
- Shared resources: goal.md (read-only), evals.md (read-only, never copied)

## Done When
- [ ] System asks 2-3 clarifying questions in the thread
- [ ] Questions reference goal.md direction for this workstream
- [ ] System maps idea to relevant evals (by reference)
- [ ] System estimates expected eval delta
- [ ] guard-001: no eval content copied into the thread or backlog
- [ ] Quality gate: typecheck && lint && test all pass

## Eval Spec
Given: User captured an idea about "simplify onboarding"
When: Claude Code responds in the thread
Then: It asks clarifying questions that reference the onboarding workstream's goal.md direction

## Circuit Breakers
- 3 test failures on same error → STOP

{"id":"ci-ty9","title":"[Checkpoint] Eval suite after Capture & Enrich","description":"Run eval-001 and eval-002 with test data. Verify capture and enrichment work end-to-end.

## Evals to run
- eval-001: Builder captures ≥2 ideas/day (target: 0.85)
- eval-002: Thread depth ≥5 exchanges (target: 0.70)

## Replan Assessment
After running evals, answer:
1. Did any eval score diverge >20% from the plan's estimate?
2. Did implementation reveal capabilities the plan missed?
3. Did implementation reveal the plan assumed something wrong?

If YES to any: Create bd create --title="REPLAN: [what changed]" --type=task --priority=0 -l replan
If NO to all: Continue with Epic 3.

## Regression check
- guard-001 (no eval duplication) must still pass","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"haase210482@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-27T12:00:09Z","created_by":"Michael Haase","updated_at":"2026-03-27T12:00:09Z"}

Set up Claude Code /schedule to trigger at 5am DK time. Agent enters workstream directory, reads goal.md, picks top hypothesis from backlog.

## Why
Moves FR-003a: Scheduled trigger reads goal.md and picks top hypothesis.

## Context
- Files: /schedule configuration, workstream directories
- Prior tasks: Supabase schema

{"id":"ci-2fi","title":"Ralph Wiggum experiment runner","description":"## What
Build the autonomous experiment loop: worktree → implement → test → eval → fix/retry → ship or reject.

## Why
Moves FR-003b: Agent creates worktree, implements, runs tests, runs evals in loop with circuit breakers.
This is the core of the execution engine — the thing that makes products improve while you sleep.

## Context
- Files: experiment runner script/skill
- Prior tasks: Scheduled agent trigger
- Shared resources: product codebase (via worktree), evals

## Done When
- [ ] Creates git worktree for isolated experiment
- [ ] Implements the hypothesis change
- [ ] Runs test suite
- [ ] Runs eval suite, measures before/after deltas
- [ ] On test failure: fix and retry (max 3 attempts per error)
- [ ] On eval improvement: merge worktree, mark as shipped
- [ ] On eval regression or no improvement: reject, log learnings
- [ ] Circuit breaker: 3 same-error failures → STOP
- [ ] Circuit breaker: >5 files touched → STOP
- [ ] Quality gate: typecheck && lint && test all pass

## Eval Spec
Given: A hypothesis "simplify onboarding to 3 steps" is selected
When: The experiment runner executes
Then: It creates a worktree, implements the change, runs evals, and ships or rejects based on eval delta

## Circuit Breakers
- 3 same-error test failures → STOP, create STUCK bead
- >5 files touched → STOP, create SPLIT bead
- Longer than estimated → STOP and escalate","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","owner":"haase210482@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-27T11:56:04Z","created_by":"Michael Haase","updated_at":"2026-03-27T11:56:04Z"}
